setting_toggle_row.name: row_debug_touches
setting_toggle_row.label: Show Touch Points
setting_toggle_row.description: Draw a ripple at each touch — helps diagnose offsets
setting_toggle_row.description_tag: Draw a ripple at each touch — helps diagnose offsets
setting_toggle_row.subject: settings_debug_touches

setting_slider_row.name: row_jitter_threshold
setting_slider_row.label: Touch Jitter Filter
setting_slider_row.description: Dead zone in pixels (raise if taps register as swipes; 0 disables)
setting_slider_row.description_tag: Dead zone in pixels (raise if taps register as swipes; 0 disables)

setting_slider_row.name: row_scroll_limit
setting_slider_row.label: Scroll Engage Distance
setting_slider_row.description: Pixels before a press becomes a scroll (lower = scrolls engage sooner)
setting_slider_row.description_tag: Pixels before a press becomes a scroll (lower = scrolls engage sooner)

setting_toggle_row.name: row_scroll_guard
setting_toggle_row.label: Scroll Guard
setting_toggle_row.description: Ignore the click that fires when you lift after scrolling
setting_toggle_row.description_tag: Ignore the click that fires when you lift after scrolling
setting_toggle_row.subject: settings_scroll_guard
